results.text:
@abdyweb3 @abdyweb3 Totally agree. Distribution is the real moat in web3, far beyond hiring or building the product itself.  

While the product is just code plus tokenomics, distribution decides if you survive the hype cycle. 

CAC exploding from paid campaigns, low LTV, and churn over 70 percent in the first 90 days show that most projects still chase growth hacks instead of organic flywheels. 

The teams cracking this today focus on community owned distribution with on chain incentives and re
